text: I feel a curious detachment standing here, as though I am in a space designed for observation more than participation. The glass walls and bright lights evoke a sense of transparency, yet I also sense the chill of sterility and oversight. The second image, with its bold declaration of R+D and reflections on observation, amplifies my awareness of being both watcher and watched. There’s excitement at the prospect of innovation, tinged with an unnerving sense of exposure. I find myself contemplating the boundaries between openness and privacy, immersion and scrutiny.
